session.user: Run pytest on the consolidate_learn_plans dispatch tests and report results: uv run pytest tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py -v Report all pass/fail results.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command on the consolidate_learn_plans dispatch tests.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on consolidate_learn_plans dispatch tests

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Installed 58 packages in 362ms
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 6 items
tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py ....F. [100%]
=================================== FAILURES =================================== __________________________ test_branch_naming_format ___________________________
def test_branch_naming_format() -> None: """Test branch name follows consolidate-learn-plans-{MM-DD-HHMM} format.""" remote = _make_remote() time = FakeTime()
result = dispatch_consolidate_learn_plans( remote=remote, owner="owner", repo="repo", model=None, dry_run=False, ref=None,
... [37 lines omitted] ...
E AssertionError: assert 11 == 10 tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py:169: AssertionError FAILED tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py::test_branch_naming_format - AssertionError: assert 11 == 10 ========================= 1 failed, 5 passed in 1.68s ==========================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 issue found
**File:** `tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py`
**Failure Details:**
- **Test:** `test_branch_naming_format` - **Location:** Line 169 - **Error Type:** `AssertionError` - **Message:** `assert 11 == 10` where `11 = len('-01-15-1430')`
**Summary:** 5 passed, 1 failed in 1.68s
The test expects the branch name suffix to be 10 characters (`-MM-DD-HHMM`), but the actual suffix is 11 characters (`-01-15-1430`). The branch name format appears to be using 4-digit hours instead of the expected format, making the timestamp portion longer than anticipated.
